name: @opentelemetry-samples/lambda-awssdk
description: Sample application for AWS Lambda using AWS SDK v2.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run compile && npm run postcompile
scripts.postcompile: copyfiles 'package*.json' build/lambda/ && npm install --production --ignore-scripts --prefix build/lambda/ && cd build/lambda && bestzip ../function.zip *

author: OpenTelemetry Authors
